introSection: Bone Shaker was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by an unknown manufacturer that was previously located at Knowsley Safari Park in Knowsley, Merseyside, England, UK. The coaster was scrapped at the end of the 2001 season and replaced by Pirate Ship, which was moved from within the park.
fullText:
Bone Shaker was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by an unknown manufacturer that was previously located at Knowsley Safari Park in Knowsley, Merseyside, England, UK. The coaster was scrapped at the end of the 2001 season and replaced by Pirate Ship, which was moved from within the park.



Yellow track and black supports.
